jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at MyGlamm
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!
